assertions.evidence: Uses 'export const metadata: Metadata' (static) and explains when to use 'export async function generateMetadata()' for dynamic pages. App Router API throughout.
Two JSON-LD blocks: '@type': 'Plumber' (LocalBusiness subtype) and '@type': 'FAQPage'. Both injected as <script type='application/ld+json'>.
Section '1. Análisis de intención de búsqueda' identifies: Transaccional con urgencia extrema, micro-momentos, format recommendation (landing page, not blog post).
H1: 'Fontanero Urgente en Madrid — Disponible 24h...' and keyword 'fontanero urgente en Madrid' in first paragraph.
